# deliveryMode

**Instance Property**

A mode specifying the requested video quality and delivery priority.

## Declaration

```swift
var deliveryMode: PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode { get set }
```

## Discussion

Use this property to tell Photos to provide a video quickly (possibly sacrificing image quality) or to provide a high-quality video (possibly sacrificing speed). This option applies only when requesting the current version of the video (that is, only when the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/version] property is [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion/current]).

The default option is [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode/automatic]. See [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode].

## Specifying Video Request Options

- **version**: The version of the video to request.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsVersion**: Options for requesting a video asset with or without adjustments, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/version] property.
- **PHVideoRequestOptionsDeliveryMode**: Options for delivering requested video data, used by the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHVideoRequestOptions/deliveryMode] property.
